title: The Storm Last Weekend
sentences: The weather changed suddenly last weekend.
Although the morning was sunny, dark clouds appeared by noon.
The wind picked up and the temperature dropped quickly.
We had to bring in the chairs from the garden.
Because the storm was so strong, the power went out.
We lit some candles and waited for the electricity to come back.
My neighbours checked in to see if we were safe.
The rain kept falling heavily throughout the night.
By morning, the storm had finally died down.
We went outside to look at the damage.
Although a few trees had fallen, nobody was hurt.
